name: @ruleoak/adapters-ts
description: TypeScript adapters for adding RuleOak permission, approval, evidence, and replay to agent frameworks and tool-calling apps.

scripts.test: node tests/adapters-ts.test.js && node tests/adapters-ts-v1.test.js && node tests/generic-tool.test.js && node tests/file-delete-blocked.test.js && node tests/shell-command-approval.test.js && node tests/database-mutation.test.js && node tests/mcp.test.js && node tests/framework-shaped-mocks.test.js && node tests/evidence-sink.test.js && node tests/policy.test.js && node tests/redaction.test.js && node tests/examples.test.js && node tests/policy-specificity.test.js
scripts.examples:all: node examples/generic-tool/run.js && node examples/file-delete-blocked/run.js && node examples/shell-command-approval/run.js && node examples/database-mutation-approval/run.js && node examples/mcp-tool-call/run.js && node examples/langchain-js-tool/run.js && node examples/vercel-ai-sdk-tool/run.js && node examples/openai-agents-js-tool/run.js && node examples/coding-agent-command/run.js && node examples/openclaw-style-action/run.js && node examples/evidence-jsonl-output/run.js
